description: Vertical screenshot of an online news article. On a white background, a small red 'EXCLUSIVES' tag sits at the top, followed by a large bold black serif headline: 'EXCLUSIVE: Trump "economy is on fire," Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling explains.' Beneath the headline is a byline row with a circular navy avatar containing the initials 'MF,' the author name 'Matthew Foldi,' and a timestamp 'May 11, 2026 - 53 seconds ago.' Below that is the article's lead image: a portrait of a dark-haired smiling man in a dark suit and light blue tie standing before an American flag and a gold-fringed flag bearing the 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' seal.
notable_text: EXCLUSIVE: Trump "economy is on fire," Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling explains / Matthew Foldi - May 11, 2026
